violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Exhaust hood needed above the domestic stove.

Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring devices are not provided. - Metal stem probe thermometer, dial range 2-220 F. - Upright refrigerator in kitchen must have a thermometer inside unit.
General equipment - Installation and location. — --Provide a paper towel dispenser at the kitchen handwash sink.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Provide test papers to monitor sanitizer concentrations - wet wiping cloths, three compartment sink, etc.
